name: ch32v203xxx_golden

wiring_guide.stage0: WCHLink only (SWDIOâ†’PA13, SWDCLKâ†’PA14, GND) + USB-C power. No GPIO jumpers. LED D1 on PA15.
wiring_guide.stage1: WCHLink only (same as Stage 0). No GPIO jumpers.
stage2: PA7(MOSI1) â†” PA6(MISO1) (SPI loopback + SPI DMA)

excluded.ch32v203_tim_encoder: needs Stage-2 rewire (PA0â†’PA6, PA1â†’PA7, conflicts with Stage-2 SPI/PWM wires); see tests/plans/ch32v203_tim_encoder.json
